Our Story

Born to Feed.
Built to Grow.

Mission

To craft innovative, flavorful food that delivers exceptional value — satisfying cravings with every bold bite.

Vision

To become a leading brand recognized for quality and innovation, expanding across the nation and beyond.

🌱
November 1, 2024 — Founded

Hungry Army launched at Chinatown Square Premier, Bacolod with a mission to bring creative, bold-flavored siopao to every Filipino table.

🔥
Q4 2024 — Instant Traction

Pork Sisig and Bulalo Steak siopao went viral locally. Daily queues, repeat customers, and a fast-growing fanbase within weeks of launch.

⭐
2025 — Pinaka Masarap Award

Recognized by food bloggers and local pages as "Pinaka Masarap na Siopao sa Bacolod." 153+ verified customer reviews and counting.

🚀
2025 — Nationwide Franchise Launch

Proven product, loyal customers, corporate structure in place. Hungry Army Foods Corporation now opens franchise opportunities across the Philippines.

Our Menu

The Full Lineup

Professional photography, real ingredients — every siopao is packed with generous, bold fillings made to impress. Jr. sizes available for all flavors.

🏆 Bestseller
₱87
Pork Sisig

Sizzling, smoky sisig inside a pillowy bun — Bacolod's most-ordered flavor. Chunky, bold, and impossible to resist.

Jr. Size: ₱90
⭐ Signature
₱115
Bulalo Steak

Slow-cooked, tender shredded beef with rich bone marrow sauce. Premium flavors in every generous bite.

Jr. Size: ₱118
🧀 Fan Fave
₱105
Pork Floss w/ Cheese

Crispy golden pork floss topped with melted cheese. A wildly addictive combination that keeps customers coming back.

Jr. Size: ₱110
🌶️ Spicy
₱88
Spicy Pork Rendang

Deeply aromatic Southeast Asian rendang spices packed inside our soft steamed bun. Bold, complex, and beautifully spiced.

Jr. Size: ₱92
₱86
Chicken Adobo w/ Egg

Tender adobo chicken with a full salted egg — the homey comfort siopao every Filipino knows and loves, elevated.

Jr. Size: ₱88
🍫 Sweet
₱75
Nutella Pao

Our beloved twisted sweet bao filled with rich, gooey Nutella. The perfect dessert pao that delights every sweet tooth.

Signature Twist Shape
Franchise Opportunity

Choose Your Mission.

Three packages for different capital levels, locations, and ambitions — all backed by the full Hungry Army Foods Corporation support system from Day 1.

🛒
Cart Package
₱49,999
One-time Investment

Markets, schools, transport hubs, and community spots. Low overhead, fast ROI, manageable solo.

  • Branded food cart
  • Initial product inventory
  • 3-day operations training
  • Marketing materials kit
  • Recipe & procedures manual
  • 3-month support hotline
Apply Now
⭐ Most Popular
🏪
Kiosk Package
₱99,999
One-time Investment

Malls, commercial strips, food courts. More capacity, higher visibility, bigger daily revenue potential.

  • Branded semi-custom kiosk
  • Complete equipment set
  • Initial product inventory
  • 5-day operations training
  • Full marketing launch kit
  • 6-month mentorship
  • Supplier network access
Apply Now
🏬
Store Package
₱199,999
One-time Investment

Full-scale Hungry Army store with dine-in, takeout, and delivery. Territorial exclusivity for serious entrepreneurs.

  • Full store design & fit-out
  • Complete equipment included
  • Extended menu rights
  • Training for up to 5 staff
  • Grand opening support
  • 12-month territory exclusivity
  • Priority supply allocation
  • Ongoing business coaching
Apply Now
Why Franchise Us

Why Hungry Army is Sulit.

Here's exactly why Hungry Army stands apart in the Philippine food franchise market.

🔥

Differentiated Product

No competitor offers sisig, bulalo steak, and rendang inside siopao at this price. Our uniqueness builds loyalty — customers can't replicate it elsewhere.

📸

Professional Brand Assets

Studio-quality product photography, a polished corporate logo, and consistent brand identity that commands credibility and trust from day one.

💰

Value-for-Money Pricing

Products priced ₱75–₱115 reach every Filipino. High volume, fast turnover, repeat customers — all driving strong daily revenue.

🤝

Complete Support System

Training, operations manuals, marketing kits, supplier networks, and ongoing mentorship. You're never figuring it out alone.

🛵

Delivery Platform Ready

Already live on GrabFood and FoodPanda. Your franchise taps into the growing online delivery market from opening day — zero setup needed.

📍

Be a First Mover

Hungry Army is in early expansion across the Philippines. Secure your city now before your territory is claimed by someone else.

How to Apply

5 Steps to Deploy.

01

Submit Inquiry

Fill out the franchise form with your details and preferred package.

02

Consultation

Our team contacts you within 48 hours to discuss your goals.

03

Site Review

We help evaluate and approve your proposed location.

04

Training & Setup

Complete training and launch your kiosk or store with our team.

05

Grand Opening

Open your Hungry Army branch with full marketing support.
